content: Phase A complete (foundations, capabilities, portal visibility, onboarding wizard, notifications)
Phase B complete (DSC vault, Credentials vault, Documents, Notices, Hearings, Attendance, Leave, Payroll)
Phase C complete (Compliance calendar, Tax projection, BizLens shell+bridge, vCFO, Insight Engine)
Phase D complete (Notification digest cron, Insight cron, Admin firm dashboard, Audit UI)
Phase E complete (cmd-K palette, saved views, bulk actions, view-as-client, version diff, empty state, shortcuts)
Phase F complete (legal docs, DPDP audit plan, production hardening checklist, launch run-book)
Single end-to-end test pass complete (zero critical/high; medium = interactive flows for user's revision pass)
